use_cases: Displaying contextual help text or hints when users hover over UI elements
Showing detailed information about a product feature or specification in e-commerce
Providing tooltips with additional context for form fields or data points
Revealing feature explanations or keyboard shortcuts in SaaS applications
Offering quick-reference information in educational or documentation interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight context card component that reveals contextual information through hover-triggered tooltips. Built with react-tooltip for accessible positioning and theming support via CSS variables. Ideal for SaaS dashboards, e-commerce product pages, and developer tools interfaces where supplementary information needs to be available on demand without cluttering the primary UI.
